title: Brent Toderian on Twitter: "When you remember that mobility in cities is largely about space, & when you see the striking math involved, you understand that EVERY person walking, biking & taking public transit is helping cities succeed, & helping EVERYONE move better. #Vancouver’s Math via @CityofVancouver https://t.co/yr01vPqjK7" / Twitter
